userMessage: Review the latest run logs and audit only. If execution failed, explain the root cause with concrete evidence and exact remediation steps. If it succeeded, say "Run looks good." If possible give suggestions

response.text:
Run looks good.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Latest run passed; stdout shows successful connection to TEKTRONIX,TekscopeSW,TEK-74HTBD4 and reads *IDN? plus *ESR?=0 with final [OK] Complete, so no root cause issue to report.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Optional: add an *OPC? check after configuration changes if you need explicit completion synchronization.","Optional: keep the existing error_check step, since the audit shows the flow completed cleanly and the error queue was not reported as problematic."],"actions":[]}
